note: Although the context is not dissimilar, this is not from the Acts of Philemon

bib.citation: Müller-Kessler, Christa. “A Palimpsest with the Martyrdom of Proklos and Hilarios (BHG 2374) in the Christian Palestinian Aramaic Transmission from the Monastery Library of Saint Catherine (Sinai, CPA NF frg. 7, fol. 5/6).” Analecta Bollandiana 141 (2023): 5-15. https://doi.org/10.1484/J.ABOL.5.136114

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.
